7 2017 CONTENTS MentalRay Licensing MentalRay --------- Mental from NVIDIA (http://nvidia.com/) is software for rendering animation frames into movies. It is available for EECS classes on the MacOSX computers in 200 SDH (http://inst.

on the MacOSX computers in 200 SDH (http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~inst/iesglabs.html) along with Maya (animation editor), Tractor (render farm) and Renderman (render tool). Licensing --------- MentalRay licenses for the EECS department

--- MentalRay licenses for the EECS department run on an Instructional server. Licenses have been obtained by Prof Garcia in Marcg 2017. The current licenses and products can be displayed by users with EECS account at https://inst.eecs.b
users with EECS account at https://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~inst/nvidia/. Instructional Support Group 384/386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
